mapper.sql: id, member_id, balance_amount, total_recharge_amount, total_consume_amount, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pt_member_wallet WHERE member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM pt_member_wallet WHERE member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_member_wallet (member_id) VALUES (#{memberId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_member_wallet SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE pt_member_wallet SET status = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 2
